title: senecio marotiri
intro: Senecio marotiri, also known as the 'Rarotonga groundsel', is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the Pacific Islands. This plant contains sesquiterpene lactones and other compounds with medicinal properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio marotiri include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, prevent infections, and protect against cell damage. Senecio marotiri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to treat fever, sore throats, and other ailments.
